_commentary.purpose: Human-readable template for scores/baseline.json. The harness loads baseline.json only (via golden:baseline). This file is not used at runtime.
_commentary.matching: Per case, predicted names are deduplicated, then greedily paired to expected names when Levenshtein similarity ≥ 0.92 (see src/pipeline/golden/metrics.ts). Names are normalized (lowercase, trim, collapse spaces) before comparison.

top_level.run_id: UTC timestamp id for a single golden:eval run (omitted when saved as baseline).
top_level.recorded_at: ISO-8601 time the run was written.
top_level.label: Run label from GOLDEN_EVAL_LABEL or default (e.g. baseline, latest).
top_level.runner: Always eval_consumer — full eval queue handler, not a direct API shortcut.
top_level.config: Snapshot of harness env (multi-pass, reasoning, image resize, etc.).

pricing.usd_per_1m_cached_input: Cached-input rate when published; otherwise same as input.
pricing.usd_per_1m_output: Standard-tier output token rate from CSV.
pricing.fetched_at: pricing_as_of date from CSV row, or ISO time for env override.

per_case_metrics.predicted_count: Count of unique non-empty predicted card name strings.
per_case_metrics.expected_count: expected_count from expected.json, or length of expected_card_names.
per_case_metrics.exact_set_match: true when normalized predicted set equals normalized expected set (exact spelling after normalize, not fuzzy).
per_case_metrics.true_positives: Fuzzy-matched pairs (one predicted ↔ one expected, similarity ≥ 0.92).
per_case_metrics.false_positives: Unmatched predicted names (hallucinations or wrong cards).
per_case_metrics.precision: TP / (TP + FP). Fraction of predictions that matched an expected card.
per_case_metrics.recall: TP / (TP + FN). Fraction of expected cards that were matched.
per_case_metrics.f1: 2 × precision × recall / (precision + recall). Harmonic mean of precision and recall.
per_case_metrics.false_positive_names: Predicted strings with no fuzzy match to any expected name.
per_case_metrics.false_negative_names: Expected strings with no fuzzy match to any prediction.

per_case_run.openai_calls: Total Responses API calls (orient + extract passes).
per_case_run.orientation_calls: Subset of calls tagged as orientation.
per_case_run.usage: Token totals from eval_report for this case.
per_case_run.cost_usd: input_usd + output_usd using pricing rates: tokens × (USD per 1M) / 1e6.
per_case_run.duration_ms: Wall-clock time for the eval job (consumer pipeline).

aggregate.case_count: Number of golden cases in the run.
aggregate.micro_precision: Sum(TP) / (Sum(TP) + Sum(FP)) across all cases — weights frequent errors by card count.
aggregate.macro_precision: Mean of per-case precision values (each case weighted equally).
aggregate.mean_count_error: Mean of |count_error| per case (absolute deck-size gap).
aggregate.exact_match_cases: Count of cases where exact_set_match is true.

_commentary.regression_tests: golden:regression compares latest run to baseline.json: micro F1/recall floors, optional cost ratio (GOLDEN_MAX_COST_RATIO).
